sections.description: WordPress-native bookings CRM with calendar, bookings, guests, importer, room management, and GitHub-based updating.
sections.changelog:
• 1.8.8.91: Mark missing Booking.com reservations cancelled when ICS no longer shows their UID.
  • 1.8.8.90: Make room pricing use adults + children (babies excluded) in backend and live form previews.
  • 1.8.8.89: Add Booking Merges approval tool to combine same-channel same-date different-room bookings into one booking.
  • 1.8.8.88: Add Booking.com ICS grouping debug preview to inspect multi-room reservation keys before grouping imports.
  • 1.8.8.87: Keep Booking.com UID on transferred target bookings so later ICS syncs do not recreate them.
  • 1.8.8.86: Fix Booking.com ICS skeleton creation to include room lines and require same channel in transfer matches.
  • 1.8.8.85: Clear stale Booking.com staged rows before each ICS sync and add pagination to booking transfers.
  • 1.8.8.84: Make Booking.com ICS import absolutely create-only by UID and loosen transfer candidate checks back to exact date+room matches.
  • 1.8.8.83: Add select-all controls at top and bottom of booking transfers table and remove action column.
  • 1.8.8.82: Hide already-transferred booking pairs and tighten transfer matching.
  • 1.8.8.81: Add bulk approve checkboxes for booking transfers and remove calendar auto-scroll to today.
